page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Movie Storyboard Collection
text:
is an artbook published by Fujimi Shobo on 23 December 1998.

Overview

It was sold exclusively in a special edition Laserdisc Neon Genesis Evangelion Theatrical Box, complete with a figurine, plush, and Carddass.

It features the complete storyboards of the movies:
Evangelion: Death and Rebirth
The End of Evangelion

Table of contents

Cut scene

A cut scene from The End of Evangelion is included in this collection, which would have taken place about 4 minutes into the film. The scene features Suzuhara, Kensuke, and Shinji outside at the school basketball court, the school now run down. Suzuhara is in a wheelchair, scoring the ball repeatedly. Suzuhara then throws the ball to Shinji, who puts his hands out weakly and fails to catch it.
